response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at Naver, which aligns with the role's MCP and agentic workflow focus. However, the resume shows limited explicit experience with production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, or major cloud AI platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure AI services), which are core requirements. Customer-facing technical leadership experience is also not clearly demonstrated.
strengths: Strong polyglot engineering background with TypeScript, Node.js, and Python-adjacent ecosystems
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow frameworks at Naver
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, talks, and open-source projects
concerns: No explicit evidence of RAG, vector databases, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
Limited demonstrated experience with major cloud AI platforms beyond AWS CDK for non-AI workloads
No clear forward-deployed or customer-facing technical discovery experience with enterprise stakeholders

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG/vector DB/GenAI production track record
